page_metadata.bioconda__summary: YASS is a genomic similarity search tool, for nucleic (DNA/RNA) sequences in fasta or plain text format.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: YASS is a genomic similarity search tool, for nucleic (DNA/RNA) sequences in fasta or plain text format
page_metadata.biotools__summary: YASS is a genomic similarity search tool, for nucleic (DNA/RNA) sequences in fasta or plain text format (it produces local pairwise alignments).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: YASS is a genomic similarity search tool, for nucleic (DNA/RNA) sequences in fasta or plain text format (it produces local pairwise alignments).
